pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam DC for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between our WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this table and tell me if you see any patterns or possible reasons for the shrinkage?

| SKU | Description | WMS Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| XR-992 | Micro-controller Unit | 1,250 | 1,244 | -6 |
| XR-995 | Capacitors (10uF) | 5,000 | 4,982 | -18 |
| XR-102 | Voltage Regulator | 850 | 849 | -1 |
| XR-440 | Logic Gate Array | 320 | 315 | -5 |
| XR-008 | Resistor Pack (50pk) | 400 | 392 | -8 |

It's mostly small amounts, but it's happening across different categories. Any ideas?

pool.baseline:

2023/10/27 14:22:01 [error] 12456#0: *78901 upstream prematurely closed connection while reading response header from upstream, client: 192.168.1.45, server: api.storefront.com, request: "POST /v1/checkout HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://10.0.0.5:8080/v1/checkout"

Can you help me figure out what might be causing this?
